rules.description: ChatGPT contentReference[oaicite:N]{index=N} citation markup leaked into the document. Mechanical, not stylistic: highest-confidence signal class in the guide.
rules.source_citation: Wikipedia:Signs of AI writing § Reference markup bugs

positive: Attribution is asserted contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0} without basis.
negative: Attribution is asserted [1] with the basis in the appendix.

rules.description: ChatGPT oai_citation marker leaked into the document.
rules.source_citation: Wikipedia:Signs of AI writing § Reference markup bugs

positive: Per NIST guidance oai_citation:12‡microsoft.com the controls apply.
negative: Per NIST guidance (SP 800-218) the controls apply.

rules.description: ChatGPT turn0search0-style browse markers, including PUA-wrapped variants.

positive: Documented by the vendor turn0search3 in their advisory.
negative: Documented by the vendor in advisory MSA-2026-011.

rules.source_citation: Wikipedia:Signs of AI writing § Reference markup bugs

positive: The hunting methodology garnered visibility【85†L261-269】 early.
negative: The hunting methodology is documented in appendix B, lines 261-269.

rules.source_citation: Wikipedia:Signs of AI writing § Reference markup bugs

positive: The number illustrates the blast radius[cite: 4] across developers.
negative: The number is cited to the vendor advisory (ref 4).

rules.description: Grok citation-card render artifacts: grok_render_citation_card_json and <grok-card> tags.
rules.source_citation: Wikipedia:Signs of AI writing § Reference markup bugs

positive: Sources agree <grok-card data-id="a1b2c3"> on the timeline.
negative: Sources agree on the timeline; see the two advisories.

rules.source_citation: Wikipedia:Signs of AI writing § Reference markup bugs

positive: The sample was first flagged in May [web:1] by an anonymous uploader [attached_file:1].
negative: The sample was first flagged in May by an anonymous uploader (VT submission).

rules.description: Assistant canvas ':::writing{variant="document" id=NNN}' block markers leaked into text.
rules.source_citation: Wikipedia:Signs of AI writing § Reference markup bugs

negative: The report begins here, no markup preamble.

rules.source_citation: Wikipedia:Signs of AI writing § Reference markup bugs

negative: The campaign expanded. Analysts noticed within a day.

rules.description: URLs carrying utm_source=chatgpt.com or utm_source=openai: the link was copied out of a ChatGPT session.
Placeholder and template leakage: 2025-XX-XX dates, INSERT_SOURCE_URL, [Your Name], editor comments. Mechanical evidence the text was generated from a template and never finished.
rules.source_citation: Wikipedia:Signs of AI writing § Phrasal templates and placeholder text

positive: Findings publish on [DATE: 2026-XX-XX] at INSERT_SOURCE_URL. Best, [Your Name]
